passInterpretation: The weighted aggregate exceeded 80, but the frozen rubric did not pass because robustness, output/export, and MCP-parity hard thresholds failed in the original cold-state review. Those historical failures are retained and are not relabeled as passed.
currentDependencyStatus: devyeshtandon/mock-screenshots PR #4 was squash-merged and deployed under the owner's explicit Cloudflare/cold-render reliability waiver. The former open-PR/deployment dependency is resolved by deployment plus waiver, not by retroactive passage of the original hard reliability threshold.
currentDecision: No automatic release decision. PR #1 remains open/unmerged/unpublished and still requires human approval; any later npm/MCP Registry release requires a coordinated version bump and tag.

taskSuccess.evidence: Actual MCP Client + StdioClientTransport supports the frozen 1:1/group attachment flows. Fresh post-deployment source-SHA evidence produced 8/8 inline image+text successes with hosted/edit URLs and no errors.

visualFidelity.evidence: Corrected competitor evidence contains the same frozen two-message/two-attachment input. Current deployed 1:1/group previews preserve the messages, times, attachments, and rendering layout. Repeated mockscreenshots.com watermarking was observed, but owner policy allows watermark-free initial output, so watermark presence is not a mandatory gate.

workflowUsability.evidence: One optional bounded image per message; image-only and mixed messages supported; existing text-only request remains unchanged.

speed.evidence: Fresh post-deployment MCP attempts completed in 822, 133, 86, 83, 93, 82, 95, and 76 ms; direct full-resolution probes completed in 406, 90, 44, 46, 51, 45, 49, and 41 ms. Historical cold acquisition instability is preserved separately.

robustness.evidence: Historical frozen result: input/error tests passed and fallback was safe, but independent cold verification observed HTTP 500 on 100/100 full-resolution probes per WhatsApp mode. The owner waived this hard threshold for site PR #4 deployment. Current post-deployment observation: 8/8 inline calls and 8/8 direct full-resolution probes succeeded; this does not retroactively change the frozen score or mark the original threshold passed.

accessibility.evidence: Alt text is supported and bounded. Historical independent review found 390 px mobile overflow to 472 px; the site remediation was merged/deployed under the owner's explicit waiver decision.

outputExport.evidence: Historical frozen result: advertised uncached hosted URLs failed cold production probes. Current post-deployment observation: all eight hosted URLs returned HTTP 200 image/png with valid signatures (403,323 bytes 1:1; 411,143 bytes group). Original threshold failure is retained; deployment proceeded under waiver.

mcpParity.evidence: Historical frozen result was blocked on stable production hosted output. Current post-deployment Client + StdioClientTransport evidence has 8/8 1:1/group inline image+text successes, hosted/edit URLs on every attempt, and no protocol errors. The former site-PR dependency is no longer current, but the original score is frozen.

commands.productionProtocol: node docs/pr-evidence/whatsapp-image-attachments/capture-production.mjs (post-deployment: 8/8 inline image+text and 8/8 HTTP 200 PNG hosted probes; historical cold failures preserved)

protocolDefinitions.inlineImageAndTextSuccess: MCP content includes image and text; text includes hosted/edit URLs and current ethics/privacy warnings.
protocolDefinitions.textLinkFallback: MCP content includes text only because the production preview render failed; hosted/edit URLs and warnings remain available. This is graceful degradation, not hosted-output success.

historicalObservation: Earlier cold-state failures and two group stdio fallbacks remain release-review evidence. They were not erased by warm/post-deployment recovery and were waived, not passed, for the site deployment.
postDeploymentObservation: Fresh source-SHA evidence at 2026-07-21T08:12:17.217Z recorded 8/8 inline image+text successes and 8/8 HTTP 200 PNG full-resolution probes. Independent review at 2026-07-21T08:05–08:07Z separately recorded 24/24 inline successes and 4/4 HTTP 200 PNG probes.

packageStatus.releaseRequirement: Explicit human approval plus coordinated package/lock/server version bump and tag before any new npm or MCP Registry release.
